---
title: FIMS Blog
description: >
  **Category Definitions**
  <br>
  <i class="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass"></i> deep-dive: learning about hard concepts in stock assessment modeling, academic exercises, and statistical best practices <br>
  <i class="fa-solid fa-newspaper"></i> fims-weekly: fims weekly newsletter <br>
  <i class="fa-solid fa-graduation-cap"></i> learn: learning about the packages within FIMS, geared towards the beginner or average user <br>
  <i class="fa-solid fa-circle"></i> other: posts that do not fit the other categories<br>
  <br>

  **Filtering**
  <br>
  You can filter the blog posts by the major categories above using the option on the left. You can further filter by minor categories (those that aren't one of the major categories) by clicking on the specific category listed in each blog post listing. To unfilter, simply click "Categories" on the left panel.
  <br>
listing:
  contents:
    - "*.qmd"
    - "!fims-weekly-template.qmd"
    - "!blog_template.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [title, subtitle, date, author, categories]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
comments: false
---
